sourceNotes.name: Manual override file
sourceNotes.note: Use this file for rule changes, named support lists, faction membership, or corrections when source markup changes.

soft-left.name: Soft Left / Tribune
soft-left.note: Populate mps with names that match LabourList tracker spellings to get live counts.

socialist-campaign.note: Left caucus. Populate with current SCG members.

labour-to-win.name: Labour to Win
labour-to-win.note: Centre-right organising bloc (Progressive Britain + Labour First).
